---
title: "Blog"
description: |
  Notes and write-ups from my data and Python learning journey.<br>
  Half tutorials for future-me, half things I wish I'd known sooner.
listing:
  contents:
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image]
  image-placeholder: sidebar.jpg
  image-align: right
  feed: true
citation: false
toc: false
comments: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css">
resources:
  - ../assets/listing-default.css
---
